ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the scouting list */,
  "pick" TEXT /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Projected defensive position or pitching role (e.g., Starter, Relief) */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., High School, College) */,
  "age" REAL /* Current age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet-inches format */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "school" TEXT /* School attended by the player */,
  "college_commit" TEXT /* College commitment of the player */,
  "future_value" INTEGER /* Future value score of the player */,
  "risk" TEXT /* Risk assessment distance between ceiling and floor outcomes */,
  "scouting_report" TEXT /* Scouting report for the player */,
  "video" TEXT /* Link to video highlights of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "parental_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the player's parents or guardians */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent or representative */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the player's agent */,
  "medical_records" TEXT /* Link to the player's medical records */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Detailed history of any injuries the player has had */,
  "workout_regimen" TEXT /* Description of the player's workout routine */,
  "mental_strength_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the player's mental strength and resilience */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from interviews with the player or their representatives */,
  "social_media_presence" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scouting report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the scouting report */,
  "scouting_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the scout regarding the player's performance and potential */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scout who wrote the report */,
  "scout_name" TEXT /* Name of the scout */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial, follow-up, final) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player in the report */,
  "potential" TEXT /* Potential future role or impact of the player */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation used for the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team drafting the player */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being drafted */,
  "draft_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the draft pick */,
  "draft_round_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the draft round */,
  "draft_location" TEXT /* Location where the draft was held */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the college belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division level of the college's baseball program */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the college */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the college's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_highlights" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL link to the video highlights */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., game highlights, training, interviews) */,
  "video_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was recorded */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_highlights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being assessed */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the level of risk */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factors affecting the player */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of risk (e.g., injury, performance, character) */,
  "risk_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the risk on the player's career */,
  "mitigation_plan" TEXT /* Plan to mitigate the identified risks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., draft, trade, signing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the player's contract */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., offensive, defensive, pitching) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., game, practice, scouting report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
